steps.t: You fought your way through the servals. Find Raphûz outside of the den and speak with him.
The deer lay before you, injured, but alive. You dealt with the serval. You should lift the fallow deer and deliver it to Raphûz.
You brought the deer to Raphûz. He bound his wound and said he would take the deer back to Iridír and secure medicine to heal the deer. He asked you t…
